title: Kinematics
subject: Physics
overview: Kinematics studies the motion of objects without considering the forces causing the motion. It forms the foundation of Mechanics and is one of the highest weightage chapters in JEE Main.
formulas: Average Velocity = Total Displacement / Total Time

notes.title: Definition
notes.content: Kinematics is the branch of mechanics that describes the motion of objects without considering the forces responsible for the motion.

notes.title: Important Point
notes.content: Displacement is a vector quantity while distance is a scalar quantity.

notes.title: JEE Tip
notes.content: Relative motion and graphical interpretation of motion are frequently asked in JEE Main and Advanced.
